mapper.sql: select contract_id, contract_code, contract_name, customer_id, dept_id, contract_type, contract_status, contract_sign_date, contract_period, contract_amount, tax_rate, amount_no_tax, tax_amount, confirm_amount, confirm_year, free_maintenance_period, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, reserved_field1, reserved_field2, reserved_field3, reserved_field4, reserved_field5 from pm_contract
mapper.select: select c.contract_id, c.contract_code, c.contract_name, c.customer_id, c.dept_id, c.contract_type, c.contract_status, c.contract_sign_date, c.contract_period, c.contract_amount, c.tax_rate, c.amount_no_tax, c.tax_amount, c.confirm_amount, c.confirm_year, c.free_maintenance_period, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, d.dept_name as dept_name, cust.customer_simple_name as customer_name, dict1.dict_label as contract_type_name, dict2.dict_label as contract_status_name, u1.nick_name as create_by_name, u2.nick_name as update_by_name from pm_contract c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id left join pm_customer cust on c.customer_id = cust.customer_id left join sys_dict_data dict1 on c.contract_type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = dict1.dict_value and dict1.dict_type = 'sys_htlx' left join sys_dict_data dict2 on c.contract_status COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = dict2.dict_value and dict2.dict_type = 'sys_htzt' left join sys_user u1 on c.create_by = u1.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci left join sys_user u2 on c.update_by = u2.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci where c.contract_id = #{contractId}

select IFNULL(SUM(pc.contract_amount_sum), 0) as contractAmountSum, IFNULL(SUM(pc.amount_no_tax_sum), 0) as amountNoTaxSum, IFNULL(SUM(p.project_budget), 0) as projectBudgetSum, IFNULL(SUM(p.estimated_workload), 0) as estimatedWorkloadSum, ROUND(SUM(p.actual_workload) / 8, 3) + COALESCE(SUM(p.adjust_workload), 0) as actualWorkloadSum, IFNULL(SUM(p.confirm_amount), 0) as revenueConfirmAmountSum from pm_project p left join ( select rel.project_id, SUM(c.contract_amount) as contract_amount_sum, SUM(c.amount_no_tax) as amount_no_tax_sum from pm_project_contract_rel rel inner join pm_contract c on rel.contract_id = c.contract_id and c.del_flag = '0' where rel.del_flag = '0' and c.contract_code like concat('%', #{contractCode}, '%') and c.contract_name like concat('%', #{contractName}, '%') and c.customer_id = #{customerId}
and (c.dept_id = #{deptId} or c.dept_id in (select dept_id from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0))
and c.contract_type = #{contractType} and c.contract_status = #{contractStatus} and c.confirm_year = #{confirmYear} group by rel.project_id ) pc on p.project_id = pc.project_id
p.del_flag = '0'
and pc.project_id is not null and pc.project_id is not null and pc.project_id is not null and pc.project_id is not null and pc.project_id is not null and pc.project_id is not null and pc.project_id is not null
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_contract
contract_code, contract_name, customer_id, dept_id, contract_type, contract_status, contract_sign_date, contract_period, contract_amount, tax_rate, amount_no_tax, tax_amount, confirm_amount, confirm_year, free_maintenance_period, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, reserved_field1, reserved_field2, reserved_field3, reserved_field4, reserved_field5,
#{contractCode}, #{contractName}, #{customerId}, #{deptId}, #{contractType}, #{contractStatus}, #{contractSignDate}, #{contractPeriod}, #{contractAmount}, #{taxRate}, #{amountNoTax}, #{taxAmount}, #{confirmAmount}, #{confirmYear}, #{freeMaintenancePeriod}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{reservedField1}, #{reservedField2}, #{reservedField3}, #{reservedField4}, #{reservedField5},
mapper.delete:
delete from pm_contract where contract_id in
#{contractId}
mapper.select:
select contract_id, contract_code, contract_name, contract_status, contract_amount, dept_id from pm_contract where del_flag = '0'
and (contract_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or contract_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by create_time desc limit 100

select c.contract_id, c.contract_code, c.contract_name, c.customer_id, c.dept_id, c.contract_type, c.contract_status, c.contract_sign_date, c.contract_period, c.contract_amount, c.tax_rate, c.amount_no_tax, c.tax_amount, c.confirm_amount, c.confirm_year, c.free_maintenance_period, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, d.dept_name as dept_name, cust.customer_simple_name as customer_name, dict1.dict_label as contract_type_name, dict2.dict_label as contract_status_name, u1.nick_name as create_by_name, u2.nick_name as update_by_name, p.payment_id, p.payment_method_name, p.payment_amount, p.has_penalty, p.penalty_amount, p.payment_status, p.expected_quarter, p.actual_quarter, p.submit_acceptance_date, p.actual_payment_date, p.confirm_year as payment_confirm_year, p.create_by as payment_create_by, p.create_time as payment_create_time, p.update_by as payment_update_by, p.update_time as payment_update_time, u3.nick_name as payment_create_by_name, u4.nick_name as payment_update_by_name from pm_contract c left join sys_dept d on c.dept_id = d.dept_id left join pm_customer cust on c.customer_id = cust.customer_id left join sys_dict_data dict1 on c.contract_type COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = dict1.dict_value and dict1.dict_type = 'sys_htlx' left join sys_dict_data dict2 on c.contract_status COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = dict2.dict_value and dict2.dict_type = 'sys_htzt' left join sys_user u1 on c.create_by = u1.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci left join sys_user u2 on c.update_by = u2.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci left join pm_payment p on c.contract_id = p.contract_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user u3 on p.create_by = u3.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci left join sys_user u4 on p.update_by = u4.user_name COLLATE utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
c.del_flag = '0' and c.contract_code like concat('%', #{contractCode}, '%') and c.contract_name like concat('%', #{contractName}, '%') and c.customer_id = #{customerId} and cust.customer_simple_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%')
and (c.dept_id = #{deptId} or c.dept_id in (select dept_id from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0))
and (c.dept_id in #{id} or c.dept_id in (select dept_id from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{id}, ancestors) > 0))
and c.contract_type = #{contractType} and c.contract_status = #{contractStatus} and p.confirm_year = #{confirmYear} and p.payment_method_name like concat('%', #{params.paymentMethodName}, '%') and p.has_penalty = #{params.hasPenalty} and p.payment_status = #{params.paymentStatus} and p.payment_status in #{s} and p.expected_quarter = #{expectedQuarter} and p.expected_quarter in #{s} and p.actual_quarter = #{params.actualQuarter} and p.actual_quarter in #{s} and p.actual_payment_date >= #{params.actualPaymentDateStart} and p.actual_payment_date <= #{params.actualPaymentDateEnd} ${params.dataScope}
order by c.create_time desc, p.create_time asc
select contract_id from pm_project_contract_rel where project_id = #{projectId} limit 1
